title: AE2 Extra Channelmodes
description: Do you want 100x as many channels in AE2? This useful mod adds more channelmode options to Applied Energistics 2!
body:
A useful mod that adds extra channelmode options to Applied Energistics 2. For performance purposes, channelmode exceeding x10000 have been disabled. English is also supported for ease of use.

Simply run `/ae2 channelmode x10` for 10 times as many channels! Works with any number from 0 up to 10000.
